ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Continued To May-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Masahisa Mitsunaga appeared for petitioner .

The Court noted the need for filing of the Inventory and Appraisal and the final accounting.
Mr. Mitsunaga informed the Court that he had marshalled the estate bank account at Union Bank in the sum of $172,318.17, and distributed it to the estate'e two beneficiaries, Rina Nakatani and Shigeru Yamada. The Court stated that the distributions should not have been made without prior approval by the Court. Mr. Mitsunaga srtated that he would file the Inventory and Appraisal and the petition for final accounting, along with receipts for the distributions made. He requested a six week continuance. The matter was continued to May 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The order to appear was ordered off calendar by the Court.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on March 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why an inventory and appraisal or petition for final distribution has not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
